description.en-US: Milesight CT105 — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors electrical current. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85. (Datasheet/user guide cover the CT10X series.)
description.pt-BR: Milesight CT105 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora corrente elétrica. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85. (Datasheet/manual cobrem a série CT10X.)
